appraisal_events.evidence: « elle a comme nom de guerre la princesse de Luxembourg ! » … « Mme de Luxembourg … et Mme de Villeparisis parurent toujours … deux drôlesses »
appraisal_events.explanation: Bourgeois speakers brand the princesse de Luxembourg (and, by association, Mme de Villeparisis) as demi-mondaines, a demeaning misrecognition the narrator frames as a persistent social misunderstanding.

status_effects.explanation: Locally discredited among the bourgeois by being taken for a courtesan, implying exclusion and lowered standing.
